overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark forest at night. The character moves from a dense birch woodland through an open grassy clearing, approaching a distant wooden farmstead building with warm lights visible in the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense birch and pine forest trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path surrounded by birch trees and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass
white-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
white-barked birch trees lining the right side of the path
rocky hillside covered with grass and small shrubs
dense dark pine trees forming the forest backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with Geralt walking away from the camera along a narrow dirt path. White-barked birch trees line both sides of the trail while rocky outcrops rise on the right. The dense canopy blocks most of the night sky, creating an enclosed, intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy clearing with distant farmstead

events.description: dense forest opens into wide grassy clearing with visible sky
wooden farm building with lit windows becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the terrain opens into a meadow

entered.detail: wooden farmstead building with warm light glowing from windows
weathered wooden posts marking the field boundary
open meadow with tall grass and scattered wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to an open clearing under the night sky, revealing a distant wooden building with warm lights. The path continues through tall grass as wooden fence posts appear on the left. The dense birch trees and rocky outcrops fall behind while the pine forest shifts to the left side of the frame.

events.description: path curves slightly left as character approaches the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden building, approaching the lit structure through the clearing

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the wooden farmstead building, which now dominates the center of the frame. A wooden fence runs along the left side of the path as the open field transitions to a more enclosed farmyard area. The building's details become clearer, revealing its rustic construction and glowing windows against the dark forest backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, dark woodland that gradually opens into a moonlit clearing centered around a glowing farmstead. It begins on a narrow dirt trail, following Geralt as he walks away from the camera between white-barked birch trees and rocky outcrops under a heavy canopy. As the forest thins, the scene expands into an open field of tall grass, shifting the pine trees to the periphery and revealing a distant wooden building with warm lights. The camera then continues forward along a path lined with wooden fence posts, transitioning from the open meadow into a more enclosed farmyard. Finally, the rustic farmstead dominates the frame, its glowing windows standing out sharply against the dark backdrop of the surrounding forest.
